name: TEAM COLE
subject: FULL THROTTLE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

The Cole campaign has been running at full throttle the last couple weeks as we are quickly closing in on the election. On Thursday night, we had a statewide call night with over 35 volunteers making calls to over 12,000 voters across the state in one night. Even our U.S. Senator Shelley Moore Capito stopped by to pitch in. To sign up to join the fun click [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/join?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_oct_2&n=1).

Friday morning Bill participated in the _West Virginia Hospital Association Gubernatorial Forum_ to talk about his plan to move West Virginia forward. Jim Justice was invited to attend, but he refused. _No Show Jim_ didn't have far to travel since the event was at The Greenbrier, but Justice has made a habit of not appearing at events where he would be asked tough questions because he has no plan other than to protect the good old boy system that has left our state last. _TalkLine's_ Hoppy Kercheval moderated the non-debate, and Bill was his guest on his show right after. You can listen to the full, unedited version that _MetroNews_ failed to post on their website [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fbill-cole-on-talkline-from-the-greenbrier&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_oct_2&n=2).

On Saturday Bill was at the West Virginia University Football game and met thousands of voters. Thanks to the West Virginia College Republicans for putting on a great tailgate.

Two big news stories that came out today. First, it is clear - just like with his campaign - Jim Justice has no plan to deal with the conflicts he would have with his businesses who have dealing with the state if he were to become Governor. You can read the comparison of the two candidates [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvmetronews.com%2F2016%2F10%2F02%2Fw-va-governor-candidates-look-to-balance-business-interests%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_oct_2&n=3). _The Dominion Post_ has a great story on Bill's campaign so take a few minutes to [check it out](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.thedpost.com%2FBill-Cole-talks-to-edit-board&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_oct_2&n=4). It is clear Bill has the best plan to move our state forward.

The week ahead will be another busy one starting with a Town Hall Meeting tomorrow night in Huntington with Woody Williams and Senator Kent Leonhardt the Republican candidate for Agriculture Commissioner. The event is from 5:00 to 6:00 p.m. If you would like to attend, call the Cole HQ at 681-265-1102.

Finally, Bill picked up some major endorsements recently. The West Virginia Chamber PAC [joined](http://www.billcolewv.com/west_virginia_chamber_backs_cole?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_oct_2&n=5) every other pro-job creator organization in backing Bill's candidacy. The National Right to Life Committee is [supporting](http://www.billcolewv.com/national_right_to_life_backs_cole?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=update_oct_2&n=6) Bill because of his steadfast efforts to protect life. | Friend -- I’m running for Governor of West Virginia because I believe our best days are ahead of us. We need strong leadership in Charleston, and I’m not talking the kind of leadership that Hillary Clinton’s biggest supporter in the state, Jim Justice, would provide. How can we elect a man governor who switches parties when it's political convenient for him? Jim Justice has a record of being both a Republican and a Democrat, proving that he has no real allegiance to anyone but himself. Justice's latest switch to the Democrat Party comes at a time when the Party has taken a precipitous step towards left-wing extremism. **To me, that just doesn’t make sense.** Like Hillary Clinton, Jim Justice is self-interested and out of touch; willing to say or do anything he believes will give him the upper hand. I am a Republican, but my first priority as governor will be to implement a robust growth agenda that will benefit every West Virginia family. name: Chantelle Hendry
subject: Evan invested in me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504f9/7be36b49/1eb3e26a/78f822ca/630029297/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- I'm one of more than 70,000 Hoosiers who were able to attend college because of Indiana's 21st Century Scholars program, which Evan Bayh pioneered as governor. Without this program, I couldn't have afforded the high-quality education I got at ISU.

21st Century Scholars is an example of what we can achieve when politicians overcome their differences and invest in students and families. I'm proud to support Evan because he bet big on my future. He gave me and thousands of other Hoosiers a fair shot at an affordable education.

**With the cost of college higher than ever, we need more bipartisan solutions to make higher education affordable.** So I was disappointed to learn that Congressman Todd Young is working to make it _harder_ , not easier, for students to afford college.

**[Will you add your name to stand with me and Evan Bayh for affordable college education?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504f9/7be36b49/1eb3e26a/78f822c9/630029297/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-with-evan-for-college-affordability")**

Congressman Young supports increasing student loan rates and slashing the Pell Grant program (which 200,000 Hoosiers rely on), and _opposes_ efforts to allow students to refinance their loans.

His actions are what it looks like when politicians put special interests over our interests.

On the other hand, Evan doesn't just believe in making college more accessible -- **he 's done it with 21st Century Scholars.**

**[I'm standing with Evan for a bipartisan solution to the college affordability crisis. Will you join us?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504f9/7be36b49/1eb3e26a/78f822c9/630029297/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-with-evan-for-college-affordability")**

Thanks,
